data.name: Faye's Garden
data.detailed_description:
Step right up, explorer!

Here, in this verdant embassy, Faye opens her arms, and legs, to you. So, don't forget take a deep breath, savor the magic in the air, and get ready to experience the beautiful land of Ithonia!

Faye's Garden is an immersive VR simulator that will allow you to get close to Faye, an ambassador for the land of Ithonia, known for her...hospitality.

Now, explorer, let’s not keep Faye waiting!

- App Features -

⭐Playful Assortment of 13 Sexy Scenes including customizable dicks, positions, and colors! Particular effort went into creating immersive facial animation expressions and sound effects that line up perfectly with each scene!

⭐Many of the scenes in Faye's Garden allow you to choose between vaginal, anal, or double penetration!

⭐Customizable Outfit: Pick and choose which elements of Faye's outfit you'd like for her to be wearing!

⭐Hand Tracking: Get hands-on with Faye! Taking advantage of the Quest's superior hand tracking functionality, use your hands to play with Faye in various poses around the garden!

⭐Walk with Faye: While walking around, you can ask Faye to walk around with you as you discover all of the scenes throughout the garden, click on the floating crystal orbs to activate them!

data.short_description: Here, in this verdant embassy, Faye opens her arms, and legs, to you. So, don't forget take a deep breath, savor the magic in the air, and get ready to experience the beautiful land of Ithonia!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Processor: Intel Core i5-4590 / AMD FX 8350
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970 / AMD Radeon R9 290
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
  • VR 支援: Meta Quest headsets via Link Cable (Air Link not recommended), OpenXR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Processor: Intel Core i5-4590 / AMD FX 8350
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970 / AMD Radeon R9 290
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
  • VR 支援: Meta Quest headsets via Link Cable (Air Link not recommended), OpenXR
